# Voclosporin 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Voclosporin 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Voclosporin</strong> 目前有 <strong>5 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Voclosporin 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Lupkynis is indicated in combination with mycophenolate mofetil for the treatment of adult patients with active class III, IV or V (including mixed class III/V and IV/V) lupus nephritis (LN).</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>primary release disorder of platelets（95.4%）</li>
<li>Glanzmann thrombasthenia（94.9%）</li>
<li>pseudo-von Willebrand disease（94.6%）</li>
<li>dermatitis（94.2%）</li>
<li>renal osteodystrophy（94.2%）</li>
<li>exanthem (disease)（93.9%）</li>
<li>severe nonproliferative diabetic retinopathy（93.4%）</li>
<li>neonatal dermatomyositis（92.9%）</li>
<li>acrodermatitis chronica atrophicans（92.9%）</li>
<li>non-renal secondary hyperparathyroidism（92.9%）</li>
<li>amyopathic dermatomyositis（92.7%）</li>
<li>impaired renal function disease（92.7%）</li>
<li>secondary interstitial lung disease specific to childhood associated with a connective tissue disease（92.0%）</li>
<li>indolent plasma cell myeloma（91.8%）</li>
<li>hyperparathyroidism, transient neonatal（91.7%）</li>
<li>acne keloid（91.7%）</li>
<li>hydroa vacciniforme, familial（91.6%）</li>
<li>bronchitis（91.6%）</li>
<li>plasma cell myeloma（91.3%）</li>
<li>ulcerative colitis (disease)（91.1%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/voclosporin/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
